name: A* Tilemap Pathfinder
description: Classic A* pathfinding algorithm for orthogonal tile grids. Supports 4 or 8-direction movement, configurable heuristics (Manhattan/Euclidean), and iteration limits. Returns shortest walkable path or empty array if unreachable.

input.name: tileMap
input.description: Map object with isWalkable(x, y) method

output.name: path
output.description: Array of [x, y] tiles from start to goal

author: Tiranyx
